## Summary

- 

## Governance

- [ ] layer placement is correct
- [ ] public surface manifest updated when public API changed
- [ ] Storybook coverage updated when required
- [ ] docs coverage updated when required
- [ ] playground proof scenarios updated when required
- [ ] ADR updated when architecture-sensitive areas changed
- [ ] changeset added when public package behavior changed

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm build:pages`
- [ ] `pnpm check:catalog`
- [ ] `pnpm check:stories`
- [ ] `pnpm check:docs`
- [ ] `pnpm check:playground-coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm check:adr`
- [ ] `pnpm check:ai-rules`
- [ ] `pnpm check:architecture`

## Labels and planning

- [ ] added one `kind:*` label
- [ ] added at least one `area:*` label
- [ ] added a `priority:*` label when useful
- [ ] assigned the right milestone when the change belongs to an active milestone

## Layer impact

- [ ] `core`
- [ ] `systems`
- [ ] `widgets`
- [ ] `page-templates`
- [ ] `apps`

## Release notes

- [ ] categorized for release notes with labels such as `breaking`, `kind:*`, `dependencies`, or `skip-release-notes`

## Notes

- Theme / ThemeType impact:
- Motion / overlay / z-index impact:
- Public API impact:
- Storybook/docs/playground impact:
- ADR / Changeset impact:
